TextView.android:text: I’m a Computer Science Engineering student with a passion for coding, technology, and continuous learning. I enjoy exploring new tools, building projects, and solving real-world problems through software.Experiences I may not have direct experience in industry, but I've developed strong skills like C , CoreJAVA , HTML CSS , Database , IOT etc through my education . I'm excited about the opportunity to apply these skills in a professional setting and continue learning and growing. I'm a quick learner, and I thrive in environments where I can absorb new information and take on new challenges I’m a Computer Science Engineering studenI’m a Computer Science Engineering student with a passion for coding, technology, and continuous learning. I'm excited about the opportunity to apply these skills in a professional setting and continue learning and growing.
